channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: UFC star Conor McGregor 'very optimistic' ahead of Trump's presidency
item.description: UFC star Conor McGregor expressed optimism for the future as Donald Trump is set to retake the White House as the 47th president of the United States.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cowboys have longest NFC Championship drought after Commanders snap streak
item.description: The Dallas Cowboys now own the longest NFC Championship drought after the Washington Commanders punched their ticket to the conference title game on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Barkley runs for 78- and 62-yard TDs in the snow and Eagles top Rams 28-22 to head to NFC title game
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley blew through a hole and ran untouched in the wintry mix, the Eagles' 2,000-yard rusher smacking his helmet with his hand on his final snowy steps of a 78-yard touchdown run.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press / AP, PHL 17

item.title: Spurs, Pacers make their way to Paris, for a week where all eyes will be on Victor Wembanyama
item.description: NANTERRE, France (AP) — Officially, Indiana will be the home team on the scoreboard when it plays San Antonio in Paris on Thursday. The Pacers know better. They will not be feeling right at home. “It’s going to be a big crowd against us, honestly,” Indiana guard Andrew Nembhard said.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ravens' Mark Andrews faces scrutiny after two crucial mistakes in playoff loss to Bills
item.description: Baltimore Ravens tight end Mark Andrews faced tremendous scrutiny on social media on Sunday night after the team dropped the divisional round game to the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jannik Sinner gets past Holger Rune at the Australian Open in a match with net and medical delays
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — First came the medical timeouts, one each for Jannik Sinner and Holger Rune with the temperature above 90 degrees Fahrenheit (32 Celsius) at the Australian Open.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ichiro is about to get his Hall of Fame moment. For Japan, he's more than just a baseball star
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Ichiro Suzuki is all about baseball, but he's much more than that in Japan. Back home, he's a wellspring of national pride, much like Shohei Ohtani now.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WADE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: There's a screw loose at the Australian Open: Sinner's win over Rune was delayed by a net problem
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The screw holding the net in place at the Australian Open's main stadium got jarred loose during defending champion Jannik Sinner's fourth-round victory against Holger Rune on Monday, delaying play for about 20 minutes early in the fourth set.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Novak Djokovic gets his apologies and is ready to focus on Carlos Alcaraz at the Australian Open
item.description: Novak Djokovic has received the apologies he wanted from the Australian Open’s local broadcaster and its employee who insulted him on the air.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Broadcaster apologizes after Novak Djokovic refuses post-match TV interview at the Australian Open
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — The host broadcaster has apologized after Novak Djokovic declined to do a customary post-match on court interview at the Australian Open Sunday to protest comments made on air by someone who works for the TV network.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Josh Allen scores 2 TDs, Bills force 3 turnovers to beat Ravens 27-25 and reach AFC title game
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen heard the “MVP! MVP!” chants directed at him from the stands, but Buffalo's quarterback deflected the credit following the Bills' hard-fought victory in the divisional playoff round. This season's Bills were thought to be thin on both sides of the ball.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Josh Allen scores 2 TDs, Bills force 3 turnovers to beat Ravens 27-25 and reach AFC title game
item.description: The Bills closed their season a perfect 10-0 at home, including a 30-21 win over the previously unbeaten Chiefs in Week 11.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Jannik Sinner gets past Holger Rune at the Australian Open in a match with net and medical delays
item.description: Defending champion Jannik Sinner has moved into the quarterfinals at the Australian Open after beating Holger Rune in a match slowed down by medical timeouts for each player and a delay because the net got knocked loose.
item.dc:creator: Howard Fendrich, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: DIMES: Steph Curry and the plight of the superstar/GM
item.description: Unlike other superstars in his position, Steph Curry is caretaking the organization by cautioning against reckless trades.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Stephen Curry considered day to day after injuring left ankle in win over Wizards
item.description: Stephen Curry injured his left ankle in the final minutes of the Golden State Warriors victory over Washington on Saturday night and is considered day to day.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ball and Bridges lead Hornets to wild 125-123 win over Bulls
item.description: LaMelo Ball scored 26 points, Miles Bridges had 21 and the Charlotte Hornets held on for a wild 125-123 win over the Chicago Bulls on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Return of Sammy Sosa a big draw for fans at Cubs Convention 2025
item.description: The convention promises a weekend of panel discussions, autograph opportunities and the appearance of one of the best all-time hitters, fan favorite Sammy Sosa.
item.dc:creator: Erik Runge, WGN 9

item.title: Utah's struggles at home continue with 5-3 loss to Rangers
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club are having a difficult time during its longest homestand of the season. The New York Rangers scored three goals in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 5-3 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 63, La Costa Canyon 61
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI- Fantastic hoops game on Wednesday night with Rancho Buena Vista edging La Costa Canyon 63-61.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Murphy and Williamson carry the Pelicans to a 119-113 win over the Bulls
item.description: Trey Murphy III scored 32 points and Zion Williamson added 21 as the New Orleans Pelicans beat the Chicago Bulls 119-113 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Beck hopes to bring big play ability to Utes offense
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - When Kyle Whittingham called former BYU quarterback Jason Beck about becoming the Utes new offensive coordinator, Beck jumped at the chance. "When I hit that time of year and had some opportunities come up, and and Coach Witt came calling," Beck said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Young Broncos should be proud of 10-win season
item.description: No one will ever be thrilled about losing a playoff game by 24 points, and the Broncos certainly aren't, but it's incredible how greatly Denver exceeded expectations this season.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Rams host wild-card playoff game nearly 400 miles east of LA because of wildfires
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams made themselves at home on Monday night for their NFL wild-card playoff game against the Minnesota Vikings — even if their adopted stadium featured an unusual amount of red and was nearly 400 miles east of their regular venue.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Texas man accused of sending Caitlin Clark violent messages on X: court docs
item.description: A Texas man is accused of sending sexually violent messages from his X account to Indiana Fever star Caitlin Clark and then driving to Indianapolis, court documents reveal.
item.dc:creator: Matt Christy, Fox 5
